rationale: This supervisor prioritizes safe, efficient exploration by preferring forward movement in clear conditions, using deterministic single-action commits, and systematic recovery from obstacles. Helper states (commit, scan, recover) ensure one-shot actions and avoid oscillations. Each state is total on uncontrollables, and only one controllable is enabled per state (except obs_front, which allows both rotate and scan for robust escape).
strategy: On front obstacle, escape by rotating clockwise or performing a full scan.
On left obstacle, rotate clockwise to avoid left-side collisions.
On right obstacle, rotate counterclockwise to avoid right-side collisions.
All action states (commit/scan) are one-shot: after the action, return to perception/decision.
Uncontrollable events always processed first; non-critical ones self-loop in commit/scan states.
No oscillation: only one rotation direction enabled per obstacle-side state.
Full scan is available as robust recovery from obs_front.
Transitions are deterministic and total for all uncontrollables in every state.
No infinite controllable loops; all helper states return to decision states after action.
